instruction:
The known characteristic value of matrix $\left( \begin{matrix} {{1}} & {{-3}} & {{3}} \\ {{3}} & {{-5}} & {{3}} \\ {{6}} & {{-6}} & {{a}} \\ \end{matrix} \right)$ is $\lambda_{{}_{1, 2}}=-2, \lambda_{{}_{3}}=4$ , so what is the value of $A$?

Options:
A. $$
a=3
$$
B. $$
a=-3
$$
C. $$
a=4
$$
D. $$
a=-4
$$
E. $$
a=-2
$$
F. $$
a=-1
$$
G. $$
a=1
$$
H. $$
a=2
$$
I. $$
a=-5
$$
J. $$
a=5
$$
